Summary: Tenant Branding Governance v1 (Master Tenant First)
Description: Build a governed branding system where master tenant branding is validated by backend policy, previewed safely, saved reliably, and applied consistently across runtime.

Summary: Define Branding Policy v1 and normalization contract
Description: Create policy spec for allowed branding values, normalization behavior, and validation error contract including v1 rule that customCss is disabled.

Summary: Introduce typed backend branding request and response models
Description: Replace untyped branding update flow with typed DTOs and reject invalid enum or type payloads with structured 400 responses.
Add server-side validation and normalization for palette, ranges, enums, URL fields, and component token whitelist before persistence.
Add POST /api/tenants/{tenantId}/branding/validate endpoint returning valid, violations, warnings, and normalized payload without persisting.

Summary: Enforce policy in PUT branding persistence path
Description: Integrate policy enforcement into save path so non-compliant branding payloads are rejected and compliant payloads are normalized then persisted.

Summary: Align backend branding tests with current defaults and policy behavior
Description: Update branding tests to current defaults and add reject-path and normalization assertions for policy enforcement.

Summary: Add frontend API contracts and gateway method for branding validation
Description: Extend frontend API models and gateway with validateTenantBranding typed request and response support.

Summary: Refactor Branding Studio state into dedicated store
Description: Centralize draft, dirty, validation, and save state to remove duplicated form and default merge logic.

Summary: Implement validation-first save UX in Branding tab
Description: Change save flow to Validate then Save and surface field-level and summary policy violations before persistence.

Summary: Disable customCss in Branding UI for v1
Description: Remove or disable customCss editing in v1 and ensure payload excludes or backend rejects customCss under policy mode.

Summary: Isolate preview scope to Branding tab until save
Description: Ensure draft preview does not mutate global runtime theme and only applies globally after successful save.

Summary: Reconcile component catalog metadata with actual PrimeNG usage
Description: Resolve catalog drift including datatable versus table naming and mismatches for dialog, toggleswitch, multiselect, floatlabel, and avatargroup.

Summary: Add CI check for branding catalog drift
Description: Add deterministic drift checker script and CI gate that fails when catalog usage metadata differs from real imports.

Summary: Apply saved tenant branding at runtime bootstrap
Description: Fetch and apply tenant branding during runtime bootstrap so theme persists on reload without opening admin branding tab.

Summary: Standardize key interactive controls to PrimeNG in admin embedded screens
Description: Replace selected native select and checkbox controls with PrimeNG equivalents in target admin embedded screens for theme consistency.

Summary: Add end-to-end branding lifecycle test coverage
Description: Add E2E flow for master tenant branding edit, validate, save, reload, and persisted apply checks including invalid payload blocking.
